messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0042",
  "title": "新成立游戏公司数量",
  "page_index": 13,
  "page_range": "13"
}

Section text:
## 新成立游戏公司数量

近三年新成立游戏公司数量分别为：110、85、39

message.content: This section provides quantitative metrics on the annual number of newly established game companies over the past three years. It directly answers retrieval questions regarding industry entry volume, specifically: "What are the exact counts of new game companies founded in each of the last three years?" and "What is the numerical trend for new game company formations?" The data lists sequential counts of 110, 85, and 39, indicating a consistent decline in new market entrants. The section contains raw statistical evidence but does not specify exact calendar years, define counting methodologies, or include tables/figures. It is suitable for retrieving historical market entry rates, tracking formation volume trends, and benchmarking industry growth or contraction periods.
